---
title: "AB323_bioptics"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-29"
---

## load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
```


## import data
```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/Eva Samson/OneDrive - University of Bergen/Dokumenter/Bergen/AB-323/bioptics")

reflectance_raw <- read_xlsx("bioptics_reflectance_v2.xlsx", skip = 11) |> 
  select(!ID)

methanol_raw <- read_xlsx("bioptics_absorbance_v2.xlsx", skip = 11, sheet = "methanol extracts") |> 
  select(!ID)

water_raw <- read_xlsx("bioptics_absorbance_v2.xlsx", skip = 11, sheet = "water extracts") |> 
  select(!ID)

invivo_raw <- read_xlsx("bioptics_absorbance_v2.xlsx", skip = 11, sheet = "in vivo") |> 
  select(!ID)

filters_raw <- read_xlsx("bioptics_absorbance_v2.xlsx", skip = 11, sheet = "filters") |> 
  select(!ID)
```


## clean data
```{r}
chla_data_clean_pier <- chla_data |> 
  filter(chl_a_ug_l_1 != "#VALUE!") |> 
  filter(sampling_date == "24.04.2026") |> 
  filter(filter == "GFF") |> 
  filter(station == "Pier") |> 
  mutate(chl_a_ug_l_1 = as.numeric(chl_a_ug_l_1)) |>
  mutate(sample_depth_m = as.character(sample_depth_m)) |> 
  group_by(sample_depth_m)
```



```{r}
chla_plot_pier <- 
  ggplot(chla_data_clean_pier, 
         aes(x=sample_depth_m, y=chl_a_ug_l_1)) +
  geom_point()

chla_plot_pier
```
